name: compras-na-25
description: MVP - Agregador de preços de compras

scripts.dev:local: concurrently "cd apps/backend && npm run dev" "cd apps/frontend && npm run dev" "cd apps/scraper && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=apps/frontend && npm install --workspace=apps/backend && npm install --workspace=apps/scraper
scripts.db:migrate: cd prisma && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd prisma && npx prisma db seed
